newsItems.summary: Richard B. Cohen: Thank you, Charlie. Adoption continues to scale, and we recently set a record processing over 6.5 million cases in a single day through our operational systems. Installation is expected to begin early next calendar year, keeping us on track with our road map.

newsItems.title: Symbotic Gears Up to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
newsItems.summary: SYM heads into Q2 earnings with strong revenue growth expectations, fueled by deployments, the Fox Robotics acquisition and rising systems demand.

newsItems.title: GCT Q1 Earnings on Deck: Buy, Sell or Hold It Ahead of Results?
newsItems.summary: GCT to report Q1 2026 on May 7, with estimates pointing toward 87 cents EPS and $344.9M revenues as costs, tariffs and acquisitions shape results.

newsItems.title: Unveiling SYMBOTIC INC (SYM) Q2 Outlook: Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
newsItems.summary: Get a deeper insight into the potential performance of SYMBOTIC INC (SYM) for the quarter ended March 2026 by going beyond Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates and examining the estimates for some of its key metrics.
